MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-05-2010 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2010 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reconsider Court Order Striking The Ruiz Answer Ccp Sec 1008, Or In The Alternative, For Relief Pursuant To Ccp Sec 473
Off Calendar Oct-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

CROSS COMPLAINANT ROGELIO RUIZ' Notice Of Motion To Reconsider Court Order Striking The Ruiz Answer Ccp Sec 1008, Or In The Alternative, For Relief Pursuant To Ccp Sec 473 IS OFF CALENDAR PER NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF THE ENTIRE CASE ON SEPTEMBER 20, 2010. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-14-2010 Continued To Nov-15-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions And For Sanctions [Ccp 2023.030, 2030.290(C)]
Off Calendar Aug-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED.
PLAINTIFF ANNA FISHKINA's Motion For Terminating Sanctions And For Monetary Sanctions is granted as it seeks terminating sanctions. No opposition has been filed. Defendant Rogelio Lopez Ruiz' answer is ordered stricken and judgment ordered entered for Plaintiff as to Rogelio Lopez Ruiz. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2010 Continued To Oct-27-10 At 02:30 P.M. In Dept 624

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Writen Discovery
Off Calendar Jun-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF ANNA FISHKINA'S Motion to Compel Answers to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests for Production of Documents and Requests for Admissions is GRANTED. No opposition has been filed. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $1,012.00 pursuant to Section 2023.030. JUDGE: MONICA F. WILEY. NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Set For Trial On Aug-30-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Aug-12-10 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 501
